data.title: OneDigital promotes Bill Carew to President and Camry Blaising to COO; focus on growth and operations.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 22, 2026, OneDigital, a prominent insurance brokerage, financial services, and HR consulting firm, revealed the appointments of Bill Carew as President and Camry Blaising as Chief Operating Officer. Carew's promotion to President and Blaising's appointment as COO signify the company's strategic leadership changes as they continue to strengthen their presence in the industry. These appointments reflect the company's commitment to growth and innovation under Carew and Blaising's leadership.

data.title: Bybit, 2nd largest crypto exchange, releases report on impact of geopolitical tension & interest rate shocks on market.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on January 22, 2026, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally, Bybit, unveiled its newest Bybit x Block Scholes Crypto Derivatives Analytics report. This report delves into the impact of recent geopolitical events and interest rate fluctuations on risk sentiment.

data.title: Jennifer Matarangas-King sworn in as USVI Commissioner of Tourism on Jan 15 at Government House in St. Croix.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Jennifer Matarangas-King became the new Commissioner of the U.S. Virgin Islands Department of Tourism in a ceremony at Government House in St. Croix. The event marked her official swearing-in to the position.

data.title: Mountain Mike’s Pizza brings back Heart-Shaped Pizza & Sweetheart Cherry Pie Dessert Pizza in February.
data.description: A popular pizza chain based in Irvine, California, is spreading love this February with the comeback of their Heart-Shaped Pizza and Sweetheart Cherry Pie Dessert Pizza. These special menu items are set to delight customers with their unique shapes and flavors.

data.title: GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) shares drop despite strong Q4 results. FY26 EPS outlook: $7.10-$7.40, free cash flow $8.0B-$8.4B. Analysts maintain Buy rating.
data.description: The stock of GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) initially rose but has now dropped on Thursday. Despite reporting Q4 financial results exceeding expectations, the company's forecast for FY26 EPS was also better than anticipated. GE Aerospace expects an adjusted EPS for 2026 in the range of $7.10 to $7.40, slightly below the estimated $7.12. The company aims for a free cash flow between $8.0 billion and $8.4 billion, with an adjusted effective tax rate below 17% and no scheduled debt repayments, planning to refinance maturities beyond 2026. Analyst Ronald J. Epstein from Bank of America (BofA) Securities reiterated a Buy rating on the stock.

data.title: Mullen Group Ltd. declares $0.07/month dividend on Common Shares, record date: Jan. 31, payout date: Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Today, in Okotoks, Alberta, Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a monthly dividend of $0.07 per Common Share for shareholders as of January 31, 2026. This dividend is slated to be distributed on February 17, 2026.

data.title: Dow up 450 pts on GDP surprise. Corning gains, Celestica & Abbott drop. Nvidia & Tesla rise.
data.description: On Thursday, there was a significant increase in the Dow Jones index following unexpected positive GDP data. Nvidia and Tesla experienced strong gains during morning trading. The stock market today saw a rise of 450 points in the Dow. Corning showed a notable rally, while Celestica and Abbott faced major losses. This news was covered live but the source was not specified.

data.title: Mendez Vela Design Collection LLC expands partnership with architect Adam Medal, undergoes rebrand for growth and collaboration.
data.description: Miami-based boutique interior design firm Mendez Vela Design Collection, LLC, operating as MVM Design, is commencing the new year by welcoming architect Adam Medal to their team. The company, known for its sophisticated and personalized luxury interiors, is rebranding to align with its development. CEO Osirys Mendez expressed that MVM's essence lies in strategic expansion and purposeful actions. The firm emphasizes collaborative and creative work processes.

data.title: Lucid Group (NASDAQ: LCID) stock rose 18% after securing strong Saudi backing. Cantor Fitzgerald report helped lift shares.
data.description: Shares of Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID) saw a significant 18% surge on Wednesday and extended gains on Thursday after receiving strong support from the Middle East region. Despite limited media coverage, a recent report from Cantor Fitzgerald gave a boost to Lucid's stock following a record low of $9.50 on Tuesday. The stock is currently on an upward trajectory. Analysts at Cantor held discussions with officials from the Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF) regarding the ongoing partnership with Lucid, confirming the Saudi sovereign fund's unwavering commitment to its financial support. Cantor analyst Andres Sheppard highlighted the... Read the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Festi renews market making agreement with Arion Banki for shares on Nasdaq Iceland to boost trading efficiency.
data.description: Festi has recently signed a new market making agreement with Arion Banki concerning the Company’s shares listed on the Main Market of Nasdaq Iceland. This replaces the prior agreement announced on 29 June 2023. The aim of this arrangement is to boost trading activity in Festi’s shares, aiding in market price establishment and ensuring a smooth and transparent price discovery process.

data.title: Victory Bancorp, Inc. in Limerick, PA, declares $0.0650 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 13, 2026.
data.description: In Limerick, Pennsylvania, on January 22, 2026, Victory Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX:VTYB) unveiled a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0650 for each outstanding common stock share. Shareholders of record by the end of business on March 2, 2026, will receive the dividend around March 13, 2026.
